newIncidents.title: U.S. launches sustained military campaign against Iran
newIncidents.description: CBS News reports U.S. military action against Iran including assassination of foreign leader and ongoing bombing campaign, raising constitutional questions about war powers and congressional authorization. Source

newCheckEvents.text: Military operations against Iran launched without clear evidence of congressional war powers authorization. Source

newTickerItems.label: WAR POWERS
newTickerItems.text: U.S. launches sustained military campaign against Iran

newTickerItems.label: CONGRESS
newTickerItems.text: Military action raises constitutional war powers questions

updates.summary: Added critical incident tracking U.S. military operations against Iran launched March 2025, including assassination and bombing campaign. Updated Congressional Oversight check events to reflect war powers concerns. Added ticker items highlighting the military action and constitutional questions raised.
